name: Kraft Foods Group, Inc.
description: Kraft Foods Group, Inc. was a prominent American food manufacturing and processing conglomerate that operated as a consumer packaged food and beverage company. Headquartered in the United States, it managed a diverse portfolio of iconic brands across segments including cheese, refrigerated meals, beverages, and snacks. Following its 2012 spin-off from Mondelēz International, the company operated independently until its historic 2015 merger with the H.J. Heinz Company. This strategic combination resulted in the formation of The Kraft Heinz Company, which continues to be a global leader in the food and beverage industry today.
